_notes.backend: Choose one transcription backend: azure (cloud), mlx (Apple Silicon local), or faster-whisper (CPU/local).
_notes.local_model: Local model weights are not bundled. Use a Hugging Face repo id or a local model directory path.
_notes.azure: For cloud mode, fill azure.endpoint and sign in from the app.

local_model._note: Local transcription settings. mlx_model accepts a Hugging Face repo id or local directory path.

azure._note: Used when backend is 'azure' and/or polish_engine is 'azure'.
